H6600.strongs_def: a word, answer, letter or decree

H6601.strongs_def: to open, i.e. be (causatively, make) roomy; usually figuratively (in a mental or moral sense) to be (causatively, make) simple or (in a sinister way) delude
H6601.kjv_def: allure, deceive, enlarge, entice, flatter, persuade, silly (one).
H6601.usage: entice(10x), deceive(8x), persuade(4x), flatter(2x), allure(1x), enlarge(1x), silly(1x)

H6602.derivation: from H6601 (פָּתָה) and H410 (אֵל); enlarged of God;

H6603.derivation: or פִּתֻּחַ ; passive participle of H6605 (פָּתַח);
H6603.strongs_def: sculpture (in low or high relief or even intaglio)

H6605.strongs_def: to open wide (literally or figuratively); specifically, to loosen, begin, plough, carve
H6605.kjv_def: appear, break forth, draw (out), let go free, (en-) grave(-n), loose (self), (be, be set) open(-ing), put off, ungird, unstop, have vent.
H6605.usage: open(107x), loose(13x), grave(7x), wide(3x), engrave(2x), out(2x), appear(1x), drawn(1x)

H6607.strongs_def: an opening (literally), i.e. door (gate) or entrance way
H6607.kjv_def: door, entering (in), entrance (-ry), gate, opening, place.
H6607.usage: door(126x), entering(10x), entry(8x), gate(7x), in(7x), entrance(3x), openings(1x), place(1x)

H6609.strongs_def: something opened, i.e. a drawn sword

H6611.derivation: from H6605 (פָּתַח) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has opened;
H6611.strongs_def: Pethachjah, the name of four Israelites

H6612.derivation: or פֶּתִי; or פְּתָאִי; from H6601 (פָּתָה);

H6613.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H6601 (פָּתָה);

H6616.kjv_def: bound, bracelet, lace, line, ribband, thread, wire.
H6616.usage: lace(4x), bracelet(2x), wire(1x), ribband(1x), bound(1x), thread(1x), line(1x)

H6617.strongs_def: to twine, i.e. (literally) to struggle or (figuratively) be (morally) tortuous
H6617.kjv_def: (shew self) froward, shew self unsavoury, wrestle.

H6620.derivation: from an unused root meaning to twist;

H6621.derivation: from an unused root meaning to open (the eyes); (compare H6597 (פִּתְאוֹם))
H6621.strongs_def: a wink, i.e. moment(used only (with or without preposition) adverbially, quickly or unexpectedly

H6622.strongs_def: to open up, i.e. (figuratively) interpret (a dream)

H6625.strongs_def: a Pathrusite, or inhabitant of Pathros

H6628.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be slender;

H6629.derivation: or צאוֹן; (Psalm 144:13), from an unused root meaning to migrate;
H6629.strongs_def: a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men)

H6630.derivation: from the same as H6629 (צֹאן) used denominatively; sheep pasture;

H6632.derivation: from an unused root meaning to establish;
H6632.strongs_def: a palanquin or canopy (as a fixture); also a species of lizard (probably as clinging fast)

H6633.kjv_def: assemble, fight, perform, muster, wait upon, war.
H6633.usage: fight(4x), assemble(3x), mustered(2x), warred(2x), perform(1x), wait(1x)

H6634.derivation: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6623 (פִּתְרוֹן) in the figurative sense of summoning one's wishes;

H6635.strongs_def: a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship)
H6635.kjv_def: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).
H6635.usage: host(393x), war(41x), army(29x), battle(5x), service(5x), warfare(2x), soldiers(1x), company(1x)

H6636.derivation: or (more correctly) צְבִיִּים; or צְבִיִּם; plural of H6643 (צְבִי); gazelles;
H6636.strongs_def: Tseboim or Tsebijim, a place in Palestine

H6637.derivation: feminine active participle of the same as H6632 (צָב); the canopier (with the article);

H6638.strongs_def: to amass, i.e. grow turgid; specifically, to array an army against

H6640.strongs_def: properly, will; concretely, an affair (as a matter of determination)

H6641.derivation: passive participle of the same as H6648 (צֶבַע);

H6643.derivation: from H6638 (צָבָה) in the sense of prominence;
H6643.strongs_def: splendor (as conspicuous); also a gazelle (as beautiful)
H6643.usage: roe(9x), roebuck(5x), glory(8x), glorious(6x), beautiful(1x), beauty(1x), goodly(1x), pleasant(1x)

H6647.derivation: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to that of H6648 (צֶבַע);

H6648.derivation: from an unused root meaning to dip (into coloring fluid);

H6649.derivation: from the same as H6648 (צֶבַע); variegated;

H6653.derivation: from an unused root apparently meaning to grip;

H6654.derivation: contr. from an unused root meaning to sidle off;

H6655.strongs_def: used adverbially (with preposition) at or upon the side of

H6656.derivation: (Aramaic) from an unused root corresponding to H6658 (צָדָה) in the sense of intentness;

H6657.derivation: from the same as H6654 (צַד); a siding;

H6658.strongs_def: to chase; by implication, to desolate

H6659.strongs_def: Tsadok, the name of eight or nine Israelites

H6661.strongs_def: Tsiddim (with the article), a place in Palestine

H6663.strongs_def: to be (causatively, make) right (in a moral or forensic sense)
H6663.kjv_def: cleanse, clear self, (be, do) just(-ice, -ify, -ify self), (be turn to) righteous(-ness).
H6663.usage: justify(23x), righteous(10x), just(3x), justice(2x), cleansed(1x), righteousness(1x)

H6664.strongs_def: the right (natural, moral or legal); also (abstractly) equity or (figuratively) prosperity
H6664.kjv_def: [idiom] even, ([idiom] that which is altogether) just(-ice), (un-)right(-eous) (cause, -ly, -ness).
H6664.usage: righteousness(77x), just(11x), justice(10x), righteous(8x), righteously(3x), right(3x), unrighteousness(1x)

H6666.strongs_def: rightness (abstractly), subjectively (rectitude), objectively (justice), morally (virtue) or figuratively (prosperity)

H6667.derivation: or צִדְקִיָּהוּ; from H6664 (צֶדֶק) and H3050 (יָהּ); right of Jah;
H6667.strongs_def: Tsidkijah, the name of six Israelites

H6668.strongs_def: to glitter, i.e. be golden in color

H6670.strongs_def: to gleam, i.e. (figuratively) be cheerful; by transference to sound clear (of various animal or human expressions)
H6670.kjv_def: bellow, cry aloud (out), lift up, neigh, rejoice, make to shine, shout.

H6671.derivation: a primitive root; to glisten; used only as denominative from H3323 (יִצְהָר),

H6672.strongs_def: a light (i.e. window); dual double light, i.e. noon

H6674.derivation: or צֹא; from an unused root meaning to issue;

H6676.strongs_def: {the back of the neck (as that on which burdens are bound)}

H6677.derivation: or צַוָּר; (Nehemiah 3:5), or צַוָּרֹןlemma צַוָּרן missing vowel, corrected to צַוָּרֹן; (Song of Solomon 4:9), or (feminine) צַוָּארָה; (Micah 2:3), intensively from H6696 (צוּר) in the sense of binding;
H6677.strongs_def: the back of the neck (as that on which burdens are bound)

H6678.derivation: or צוֹבָה; or צֹבָה; from an unused root meaning to station; a station;
H6678.strongs_def: Zoba or Zobah, a region of Syria

H6679.derivation: a primitive root; also denominative from H6718 (צַיִד)
H6679.strongs_def: to lie alongside (i.e. in wait); by implication, to catch an animal (figuratively, men); to victual (for a journey)

H6680.kjv_def: appoint, (for-) bid, (give a) charge, (give a, give in, send with) command(-er, -ment), send a messenger, put, (set) in order.
H6680.usage: command(430x), charge(39x), commandment(9x), appoint(5x), bade(3x), order(3x), commander(1x)

H6683.derivation: from an unused root meaning to sink;

H6684.strongs_def: to cover over (the mouth), i.e. to fast

H6689.derivation: or צוֹפַי; or צִיף; from H6688 (צוּף); honey-comb;
H6689.strongs_def: Tsuph or Tsophai or Tsiph, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine

H6690.derivation: from an unused root meaning to expand, breadth;

H6692.strongs_def: to twinkle, i.e. glance; by analogy, to blossom (figuratively, flourish)

H6693.kjv_def: constrain, distress, lie sore, (op-) press(-or), straiten.

H6694.derivation: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of narrowness (of orifice));
H6694.strongs_def: to pour out, i.e. (figuratively) smelt, utter

H6696.strongs_def: to cramp, i.e. confine (in many applications, literally and figuratively, formative or hostile)
H6696.kjv_def: adversary, assault, beset, besiege, bind (up), cast, distress, fashion, fortify, inclose, lay siege, put up in bags.
H6696.usage: besiege(21x), distress(3x), bind(2x), adversaries(1x), assault(1x), bags(1x), beset(1x), cast(1x), fashioned(1x), fortify(1x), inclose(1x)

H6697.strongs_def: properly, a cliff (or sharp rock, as compressed); generally, a rock or boulder; figuratively, a refuge; also an edge (as precipitous)
H6697.kjv_def: edge, [idiom] (mighty) God (one), rock, [idiom] sharp, stone, [idiom] strength, [idiom] strong. See also H1049 (בֵּית צוּר).
H6697.pos: masculine noun, proper noun with reference to deity
H6697.usage: rock(64x), strength(5x), sharp(2x), God(2x), beauty(1x), edge(1x), stones(1x), strong(1x)

H6698.strongs_def: Tsur, the name of a Midianite and of an Israelite

H6699.strongs_def: a rock (Job 28:10); also a form (as if pressed out)
